full_text:
Cao Anmin 曹安民
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Cao Anmin (曹安民)was born in Pei. Served Wei. Cao Cao’s nephew. Died in the battle against Zhang Xiu. Cao Anmin was affiliated with the Wei Kingdom. Cao Anmin lived during the Later Han Dynasty period of Chinese history.
